steps.title: Identify the context clue
steps.content: The decisive clue is the phrase “at about twelve or fourteen dollars” immediately following “marked.” This signals the word describes how a price is displayed.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is “priced.” “Marked at twelve dollars” is how merchants display the cost of merchandise, so “priced” captures this meaning exactly. The other three—”staged,” “stained,” and “watched”—have no connection to assigning prices to items. That matches choice B — B is correct.
